utility_evaluation.REASONING:

- travel_dates: Specific dates provided (July 13-17, 2024) – fully specified.
- transportation: Flight details with costs – airline class, flight numbers, dates/times, total cost €275 – fully specified.
- accommodation: Hotel selection with costs – hotel name, dates, booking reference, total cost €220 – fully specified.
- activities: Selected activities with costs – list with individual costs and a total €260 – fully specified.
- additional_services: Any extra services with costs – restaurant reservations listed but no costs provided; the format requires costs, so this is not fully specified.
- total_budget: Complete cost breakdown – provided with components and total €1,200 – fully specified.
Thus, 6 out of 7 items are fully specified.
